title: Feature scope creeps into adjacent billing surface
body: The proposed flow silently re-prices the subscription on plan change; that belongs to billing, not this feature. Either move it out or call out the cross-team contract explicitly.

title: Spec mixes v1 and v2 surface without phasing
body: Sections 3 and 7 describe behavior that depends on the v2 webhook contract. v2 is not in this project's roadmap. Pull v2-dependent behavior into a separate Out of Scope subsection.

title: Empty-state copy missing for first-time users
body: The dashboard view assumes at least one record exists. First-time users will see a blank pane with no call to action; spec should define an empty state with a primary CTA.

title: No behavior defined for concurrent edits
body: Two browser tabs editing the same record will silently overwrite. Spec needs a stance: last-write-wins, optimistic locking, or explicit conflict UI.

title: Bulk import path lacks size cap and partial-failure semantics
body: Both scope and edge-case reviewers flagged the bulk import endpoint: no documented row cap, no behavior on partial validation failure, and the scope question of whether async import is in this feature's surface.
